Question: Find ⓐ the sales tax and ⓑ the total cost: Alexandra bought a television set for $$\text{$724}$$ in Boston, where the sales tax rate was $$\text{6.25%}$$ of the purchase price.
Find ⓐ the sales tax and ⓑ the total cost: Kim bought a winter coat for $$\text{$250}$$ in St. Louis, where the sales tax rate was $$\text{8.2%}$$ of the purchase price.
Diego bought a new car for $$\text{$26,525} .$$ He was surprised that the dealer then added $$\text{$2,387.25} .$$ What was the sales tax rate for this purchase?
What is the sales tax rate if a $$\text{$7,594}$$ purchase will have $$\text{$569.55}$$ of sales tax added to it?
Bob is a travel agent. He receives $$\text{7%}$$ commission when he books a cruise for a customer. How much commission will he receive for booking a $$\text{$3,900}$$ cruise?
Fernando receives $$\text{18%}$$ commission when he makes a computer sale. How much commission will he receive for selling a computer for $$\text{$2,190} ?$$
Homer received $$\text{$1,140}$$ commission when he sold a car for $$\text{$28,500} .$$ What rate of commission did he get?
Bernice earned $$\text{$451}$$ commission when she sold an $$\text{$8,200}$$ living room set. What rate of commission did she get?
Marta bought a dishwasher that was on sale for $$\text{$75}$$ off. The original price of the dishwasher was $$\text{$525} .$$ What was the sale price of the dishwasher?
Orlando bought a pair of shoes that was on sale for $$\text{$30}$$ off. The original price of the shoes was $$\text{$112} .$$ What was the sale price of the shoes?
Find ⓐ the amount of discount and ⓑ the sale price: Sergio bought a belt that was discounted $$\text{40%}$$ from an original price of $$\text{$29} .$$
Find ⓐ the amount of discount and ⓑ the sale price: Oscar bought a barbecue grill that was discounted $$\text{65%}$$ from an original price of $$\text{$395} .$$
Find ⓐ the amount of discount and ⓑ the discount rate: Lena bought a kitchen table at the sale price of $$\text{$375.20} .$$ The original price of the table was $$\text{$560} .$$
Find ⓐ the amount of discount and ⓑ the discount rate: Nick bought a multi-room air conditioner at a sale price of $$\text{$340} .$$ The original price of the air conditioner was $$\text{$400} .$$
Jim's music store bought a guitar at wholesale price $$\text{$1,200} .$$ Jim marked the price up $$\text{50%} .$$ Find the ⓐ amount of mark-up and ⓑ the list price.
The Auto Resale Store bought Pablo's Toyota for $$\text{$8,500} .$$ They marked the price up $$\text{35%} .$$ Find the ⓐ amount of mark-up and ⓑ the list price.
